title: Assignment pattern key not supported/understood when key is actually a localparam

features.name: assignment pattern with localparam key on array of structs
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern for an array of structs where a localparam is used as the key/index in the pattern

features.name: packed struct typedef with assignment pattern initialization
features.description: Code should include a packed struct typedef initialized using assignment pattern syntax with named fields
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { bit a; int b; } t_struct;
localparam t_struct s = '{ a: 1, b: 42 };

features.name: localparam used as array index key in assignment pattern
features.description: Code should include a localparam integer used as an index key in an array assignment pattern
features.snippet:
localparam int idx = 'd1;
localparam int arr[2] = '{ 'd0: 10, idx: 20 };
